_meta.purpose: Curated word → image-URL mapping for the WordPopover image slot. The popover renders the image (lazy-loaded) only when imageForWord(word) returns non-null; missing entries simply hide the slot — no broken-image icon ever shown.
_meta.license_policy: Only CC-BY, CC-BY-SA, CC0, or public-domain images. Wikimedia Commons + Open Symbols are the two canonical sources per spec. Wikimedia URLs use Special:FilePath for stable hotlinking (auto-resolves to current CDN URL).
_meta.expansion_path: Add lowercase word keys mapping to image URL strings. The loader is case-insensitive. To bulk-import from a CSV: see scripts/build-image-dictionary.mjs (TODO).
_meta.v0_scope: Ships with a minimal seed (the spec targets ~2000 entries from manual curation — that's a content task, not a code task; the infrastructure is complete and the JSON expands without code changes).
_meta.key_format: lowercased word → URL string (no spaces, no escapes). The loader trims + lowercases the input before lookup.
_meta.fallback_behaviour: If imageForWord returns null, WordPopover omits the image slot. If imageForWord returns a URL but the image fails to load (404, network error, CORS), the onError handler hides the slot — popover still renders cleanly.
